metadata.name: Candidate Pipeline — Main
metadata.description: Full 16-step candidate intake pipeline. Triggered by a Typeform CV submission. Parses the CV with Claude AI, creates an Airtable record, matches skills against open roles, branches on match/no-match, creates a ClickUp review task, sends an acknowledgement email, delays 3 days, then sends a Slack reminder to the recruiter if no action has been taken.

config.note: Connect to the 'Candidate CV Submission' form. Typeform-hosted file URLs expire — the CV file URL must be used or archived within this Zap run.
Check whether this email already exists in Airtable. If a record is found, step 3 will update it; if not, step 3 will create it.

output_variables.existing_record_id: Airtable Record ID (empty if new candidate)
output_variables.existing_status: Status field value (empty if new candidate)

steps.label: Parse CV — Claude AI via Anthropic API

data.system: You are a CV parser for a recruitment system. Extract a structured JSON object from the candidate information provided. Return ONLY valid JSON with no preamble or explanation.

config.note: Calls the Anthropic API directly. The response JSON contains the parsed CV fields. Follow immediately with step 4 (Code) to extract individual fields.

output_variables.claude_response_body: Full API response JSON string — pass content[0].text to step 4

steps.label: Extract Parsed Fields — Code by Zapier (JavaScript)

config.note: Wraps JSON.parse in a try/catch. On failure, sets parse_success=false so step 5 can set status to 'Needs Manual Review' instead of 'New'.

steps.label: Compute Initial Status — Code by Zapier (JavaScript)

config.note: Determines whether to set status to 'New' or 'Needs Manual Review' and flags resubmissions.
If existing_record_id is populated (resubmission) this updates; otherwise creates a new record. Set Resubmission checkbox = true when is_resubmission = true.

output_variables.airtable_record_id: Airtable Record ID — used in all subsequent update steps

config.note: Returns all open roles matching the candidate's parsed role type. If zero results, the match score step returns 0 and the Paths step routes to no-match.

output_variables.open_role_id: Airtable Record ID of first matching open role

steps.label: Compute Skill Match Score — Code by Zapier (JavaScript)

config.note: 40% skill overlap threshold. Returns is_match=false if no open role was found. Handles empty required skills list gracefully.

steps.label: Paths by Zapier — Match vs No Match

config.note: Requires Zapier Professional plan. Both paths converge and steps 13–16 run regardless of path taken.
Creates task in the open role's designated ClickUp list. Due date is set 3 days out using Formatter date arithmetic before this step if needed.

config.subject: We've received your application — {{candidate_name}}
config.body:
Application Received

Hi {{candidate_name}},

Thank you for submitting your CV to {{COMPANY_NAME}}.

We've received your application and our team will review your profile against our current openings.

Role Interest{{role_interest}}
Experience{{years_experience}} years
Skills on file{{step_4_skills}}

If your profile matches an open role, a member of our recruitment team will be in touch within 5 business days. In the meantime, feel free to reply to this email with any questions.

Best regards,
The {{COMPANY_NAME}} Recruitment Team

{{COMPANY_NAME}} · {{COMPANY_ADDRESS}} · {{RECRUITMENT_EMAIL}}
config.note: Fires unconditionally after both Paths branches resolve. Keep the email neutral — do not reference whether a match was found.
Requires Zapier Professional plan. Pauses the Zap task for exactly 3 calendar days from when this step is reached. Use a 1-minute delay during development/testing.
Re-reads the record to get the current Status and Reminder Sent values, which may have changed while the Zap was delayed.

output_variables.reminder_sent: Current value of Reminder Sent checkbox

steps.label: Filter — Only if Still Shortlisted and Reminder Not Sent

config.note: Stops the Zap if the recruiter has already acted (status changed to Interview Scheduled, Contacted, Rejected, etc.) or if a reminder was already sent.
Sends a DM to the recruiter's Slack user ID (from the Open Role record). Falls back to #recruitment-alerts channel if preferred.
Prevents duplicate reminders if the Zap is accidentally re-triggered. Always runs immediately after the Slack step.
